title: Teal Mask (Ogerpon's Masks)
description: A resource pack which adds in Ogerpon's masks from the Pokemon Scarlet and Violet Teal Mask DLC
body:
From Pokemon Scarlet and Violet's first DLC, The Teal Mask, this resource pack brings the Teal, Wellspring, Cornerstone, and Hearthflame masks into players' hands AND faces. 

=======================================
REQUIRES CIT
I recommend using Optifine or a mod like Forge CIT
=======================================



CIT Names:

Teal Mask</br>
Wellspring Mask</br>
Hearthflame Mask</br>
Cornerstone Mask</br>
Spell Tag</br>


![Teal Mask](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t20V6ukf/images/f6ac49c86c3d919901f083bd11dc6b11505d9680.png)
